name: Chicken Fried Steak
recipeIngredient: 2 pieces top round steak, cubed, about 6-8 ounces each
recipeInstructions:
1. In a plastic bag, mix together the flour, black pepper, and salt.
2. In a shallow dish, beat the egg with water until frothy using a fork.
3. Coat one piece of steak in the seasoned flour mixture, then dip it into the egg wash, and coat again with flour. Repeat with the remaining steak pieces.
4. Heat peanut oil in a frying pan until a bread cube browns within 1 minute.
5. Fry the coated steak pieces in hot oil until they are crispy brown on both sides and cooked through. Serve with white gravy (cream sauce).
6. Gravy: Melt butter in a frying pan over low heat. Stir in flour for one minute, then remove from heat. Gradually stir in milk until smooth. Return to heat, adjust to medium, and cook, stirring until bubbly and thickened.
